scope.summary: Dedup: duplicate of oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.8.1 (G1 IAM subject-mapping config), the work bead created for this exact defect; he7t remains the historical defect record.
out_of_scope: The defect fix itself: it is tracked and will be evidence-closed on the canonical bead oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.8.1.

limitations: This is a tracker dedup (plan v8 sec.10 / G13 operator ruling 2026-07-20: one bead per defect, ever), not a claim the underlying defect is fixed.
The canonical open bead oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.8.1 carries the fix and its own landed evidence at close time.
